checks.describe: Ollama is running — the deep-dive page seeds nothing persistent and relies on the host model server (state-tolerant re-check)
checks.run: curl -s --max-time 5 http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/version | jq -r 'if .version then "ollama-up" else "ollama-down" end'

checks.describe: the course model's quantization field is a K-quant (Q4_K_M) — the family/size letters section 1 reads (K = non-uniform, M = medium)
checks.run: ollama show qwen3:0.6b 2>/dev/null | grep -i quantization | grep -c 'Q4_K_M' | xargs -I{} sh -c 'if [ {} -ge 1 ]; then echo is-k-quant; else echo not-k-quant; fi'

checks.describe: requesting num_ctx:8192 loads the model at that context — the context-economics knob (section 2). Asserts ollama ps reports 8192, proving the configured context (and its KV reservation) changed
checks.run: curl -s --max-time 60 http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate -d '{"model":"qwen3:0.6b","prompt":"Say hello in one word. /no_think","stream":false,"think":false,"options":{"num_ctx":8192}}' >/dev/null 2>&1; ollama ps | grep -c '8192' | xargs -I{} sh -c 'if [ {} -ge 1 ]; then echo ctx-8192; else echo ctx-other; fi'

checks.describe: the full Apache-2.0 licence text is readable from the model card — the licence-classes close read (section 3)
checks.run: ollama show --license qwen3:0.6b 2>/dev/null | grep -ic 'Apache License' | xargs -I{} sh -c 'if [ {} -ge 1 ]; then echo apache-readable; else echo apache-missing; fi'

checks.describe: the model card lists the tools capability — the substrate for the tool-call semantics section 4 discusses (used in M13)
checks.run: ollama show qwen3:0.6b 2>/dev/null | grep -ic 'tools' | xargs -I{} sh -c 'if [ {} -ge 1 ]; then echo tools-capable; else echo tools-absent; fi'
